metadata.description: Loom — an AI-operable HTTP/HTTPS debugging proxy for macOS, distributed as a Claude Code plugin. The agent inspects and modifies live traffic over MCP; the human supervises from the menu-bar panel.

plugins.name: loom
plugins.description: Drive Loom's debugging proxy over MCP: inspect captured HTTP/HTTPS flows, replay requests with overrides, and mock / map-remote / map-local / rewrite / find-replace / block / delay traffic with rules (grouped for scenario switching). Toggle HTTPS interception per host, export the root CA, and export flows to HAR. Requires the Loom app to be running.
